findings.evidence: `rg -n "index_range_powMonoidHom_le_of_closure_eq_top|units_sq_index_le|index_range_powMonoidHom_two_le" code/TauCeti` shows the general theorem at `TauCeti/Algebra/Group/PowMonoidHom.lean:25-27`, but `UnitSquares.lean:42-43` states only the square case and `UnitSquares.lean:65` calls the square corollary after the `hgen` construction that does not depend on the exponent.
findings.fix: Prove `units_pow_index_le (F) {n : ℕ} (hn : 0 < n) : (powMonoidHom n : (𝓞 F)ˣ →* (𝓞 F)ˣ).range.index ≤ n ^ Module.finrank ℚ F` using `TauCeti.index_range_powMonoidHom_le_of_closure_eq_top hn hgen`, then derive `units_sq_index_le` as the `n = 2` corollary.
findings.issue: `units_sq_index_le` specializes to `(powMonoidHom 2).range.index ≤ 2 ^ Module.finrank ℚ F`, while the proof first constructs a finite generating set independent of `2` and the imported abstract theorem already handles every positive `n`.

summary: The abstract group API is now at the natural positive-power level, but the number-field endpoint still hard-codes squares even though the same proof gives the standard `n`th-power bound.
